parameters.query:
SET app.current_tenant = '{{ $json.tenantId }}';
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug
FROM tenants t
WHERE t.id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
  AND t.is_active = true
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM api_keys k
    WHERE k.tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid
      AND k.key_hash = encode(sha256('{{ $json.apiKey }}'::bytea), 'hex')
      AND k.is_active = true
      AND (k.expires_at IS NULL OR k.expires_at > NOW())
  )
LIMIT 1;

SET app.current_tenant = '{{ $json.tenantId }}';
SELECT
  c.id AS chunk_id,
  c.content,
  c.chunk_index,
  c.metadata,
  e.similarity,
  s.name AS source_title,
  s.source_type
FROM search_similar(
  '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.vectorStr }}'::vector(1024),
  5,
  0.3
) e
JOIN chunks c ON c.id = e.chunk_id
JOIN documents d ON d.id = c.document_id
JOIN sources s ON s.id = d.source_id
ORDER BY e.similarity DESC;
